name: personal_warps
description: Personal per-user warp management with set, delete, list, and teleport commands with safe warp-name listing

commands.label: warp
commands.code: (function(ctx, state) { var sender = ctx.getSender(); var args = ctx.getArgs(); if (!state.warps) state.warps = {}; function isWarpRecord(v) { return v && typeof v === 'object' && typeof v.world !== 'undefined' && typeof v.x !== 'undefined' && typeof v.y !== 'undefined' && typeof v.z !== 'undefined'; } function getVal(obj, key) { if (!obj) return undefined; try { if (typeof obj.get === 'function') { var gv = obj.get(key); if (typeof gv !== 'undefined' && gv !== null) return gv; } } catch (e) {} try { return obj[key]; } catch (e2) { return undefined; } } function eachKey(obj, fn) { if (!obj) return; try { if (typeof obj.keySet === 'function') { var ks = obj.keySet(); var arr = (ks && typeof ks.toArray === 'function') ? ks.toArray() : ks; if (arr && typeof arr.length !== 'undefined') { for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) fn(String(arr[i])); return; } } } catch (e) {} try { var keys = Object.keys(Object(obj)); for (var j = 0; j < keys.length; j++) fn(String(keys[j])); } catch (e2) {} } function normalizeWarpRecord(v) { return { world: String(v.world), x: Number(v.x), y: Number(v.y), z: Number(v.z), yaw: typeof v.yaw === 'undefined' ? 0 : Number(v.yaw), pitch: typeof v.pitch === 'undefined' ? 0 : Number(v.pitch) }; } function normalizeWarpMap(map) { var out = {}; eachKey(map, function(k) { var v = getVal(map, k); if (typeof v === 'function') return; if (!isWarpRecord(v)) return; var rec = normalizeWarpRecord(v); if (!rec.world || isNaN(rec.x) || isNaN(rec.y) || isNaN(rec.z)) return; out[String(k).toLowerCase()] = rec; }); return out; } function normalizeAllWarps(saved) { var out = {}; if (!saved || typeof saved !== 'object') return out; eachKey(saved, function(owner) { var m = normalizeWarpMap(getVal(saved, owner)); if (Object.keys(m).length > 0) out[String(owner)] = m; }); return out; } if (!state.loaded) { try { var saved = database.getJson('personal_warps'); state.warps = normalizeAllWarps(saved); } catch (e) { state.warps = {}; } state.loaded = true; } function saveWarps() { try { database.setJson('personal_warps', state.warps); } catch (e) {} } function getPlayerKey(player) { return String(player.getId()); } function getCurrentLocation(player) { return player.getLocation(); } function listWarpNames(map) { var names = []; var clean = normalizeWarpMap(map); var keys = Object.keys(clean); for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) names.push(keys[i]); return names.sort(); } function teleportPreservingLook(player, world, warp) { var current = player.getLocation(); if (current && current.getWorldName && current.getWorldName() === warp.world) { player.teleport(current.add(Number(warp.x) - current.getX(), Number(warp.y) - current.getY(), Number(warp.z) - current.getZ())); return; } player.teleport(world.location(Number(warp.x), Number(warp.y), Number(warp.z))); } if (!sender.isPlayer()) { sender.sendMessage('&cPlayers only.'); return; } var player = sender.asPlayer(); var owner = getPlayerKey(player); state.warps[owner] = normalizeWarpMap(state.warps[owner]); var playerWarps = state.warps[owner]; var sub = (args.length > 0 && args[0] != null) ? String(args[0]).toLowerCase() : ''; if (!sub || sub === 'list') { var names = listWarpNames(playerWarps); if (names.length === 0) { player.sendMessage('&eYou have no personal warps.'); return; } player.sendMessage('&aYour personal warps: &e' + names.join('&7, &e')); return; } if (sub === 'set') { if (args.length < 2) { player.sendMessage('&cUsage: /warp set <name>'); return; } var name = String(args[1]).trim().toLowerCase(); if (!name || !/^[a-z0-9_-]{1,32}$/.test(name)) { player.sendMessage('&cWarp name must be 1-32 characters using letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.'); return; } var loc = getCurrentLocation(player); playerWarps[name] = { world: loc.getWorldName(), x: loc.getX(), y: loc.getY(), z: loc.getZ(), yaw: loc.getYaw(), pitch: loc.getPitch() }; state.warps[owner] = playerWarps; saveWarps(); player.sendMessage('&aSaved personal warp \'&e' + name + '&a\'.'); return; } if (sub === 'delete' || sub === 'del' || sub === 'remove') { if (args.length < 2) { player.sendMessage('&cUsage: /warp delete <name>'); return; } var delName = String(args[1]).trim().toLowerCase(); if (!delName) { player.sendMessage('&cWarp name cannot be empty.'); return; } if (!isWarpRecord(playerWarps[delName])) { player.sendMessage('&cYou do not have a warp named \'&e' + delName + '&c\'.'); return; } delete playerWarps[delName]; state.warps[owner] = playerWarps; saveWarps(); player.sendMessage('&aDeleted personal warp \'&e' + delName + '&a\'.'); return; } var warpName = sub; if (!isWarpRecord(playerWarps[warpName])) { player.sendMessage('&cYou do not have a warp named \'&e' + warpName + '&c\'.'); return; } var warp = normalizeWarpRecord(playerWarps[warpName]); var world = server.getWorld(warp.world); if (world == null) { player.sendMessage('&cThat warp\'s world is not currently available.'); return; } teleportPreservingLook(player, world, warp); player.sendMessage('&aTeleported to personal warp \'&e' + warpName + '&a\'.'); })
